one_line_verdict: A scrappy, character-driven MCU entry best enjoyed by franchise fans on the big screen — casual viewers can wait for streaming without missing much.
english_note: Standard MCU dialogue — clear delivery, minimal jargon, accessible American English throughout.
credits_detail: Speculative: As a Phase 5 MCU title, mid- and/or post-credits scenes are highly likely, setting up future Marvel projects — stay seated through the full credits.
one_line_summary: Marvel's misfits unite — a character-first antihero team-up with Florence Pugh leading the charge.
